title: PlatformConfig
description: The platform configuration for the instance. Includes settings for Secure Boot, measured boot, and trusted platform module.

isSecureBootEnabled.description: Whether Secure Boot is enabled on the instance

isTrustedPlatformModuleEnabled.description: Whether the Trusted Platform Module (TPM) is enabled

isMeasuredBootEnabled.description: Whether the Measured Boot feature is enabled

isMemoryEncryptionEnabled.description: Whether AMD memory encryption is enabled
